valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Fri 19 Jun 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Sat 20 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low northwest Bailey 994 losing its identity by 0600 tomorrow. New low expected 300 miles northeast of Faeroes 988 by same time
